hypothesis: If property-specific concept embeddings learned by a Concept Bottleneck Model are combined into steering vectors and added to the hidden activations of a frozen LLM, then the LLM will generate molecules whose target properties (e.g., QED, LogP) more closely match specified values (lower MAE/Best100MAE) while preserving validity, novelty, uniqueness, and synthetic accessibility, outperforming activation-addition and parameter-efficient or full fine-tuning baselines, including in out-of-distribution scenarios.
